findings.description: Exception name `NMJsonBodyConvertorException` appears in the source code example but is absent from s2 hints.

`connectionFWpropertyList` and `encryptionPropertyList` are explicitly named in the source text as examples of property lists and are reproduced in the s3 section body, but neither appears in the s3 hints.
findings.source_evidence: （通信基盤の :ref:`connectionFWpropertyList` や 暗号化機能の :ref:`encryptionPropertyList` など）
